summary: Session 2: D2 agent handoff + D3 not-started toggle shipped. (1) verificationModeRewrite.ts - pure byte-preserving rewriter for the spec-config verificationMode: scalar, sibling of tierRewrite.ts (same CONFIG_BLOCK_RE, outcome enum, quote/comment/CRLF preservation, absent-key insertion with default out-of-band-or-none, typo-repair) - plus verificationModeRecordExists (Python-parity mirror of has_verification_mode_record) and, after the R1 verifier finding, inspectActivityLog (no-records|has-records|unreadable; ANY entry counts; fail-loud on unreadable). (2) dabbler.copyVerificationKickoffPrompt - pointer-style D2 builder in copyPromptCommands.ts referencing the workflow doc's Mode B section and the blessed start_session --type verification/--type remediation --handoff CLI, demanding a different engine via the per-session orchestrator blocks, embedding no doc bodies; copyEval registry entry 'Verification Kickoff' on Lightweight dedicated-sessions rows with no completed verification session, cancelled excluded. (3) dabblerSessionSets.setupVerification ('Set Up Dedicated Verification...') - not-started Lightweight rows only this session; handler re-checks tier/state, refuses on ANY activity-log history (fail-loud on unreadable logs - no drift by construction), mode QuickPick with current-mode annotation (both directions legal pre-record, mirroring Switch Tier), explicit confirmation whose one-way consequence copy names the N/M+ growth, seed rewrite via the pure helper (same-mode pick repairs malformed scalars), refresh + toast. (4) dabbler.openExternalVerificationDoc reused as flat row action 'Open External Verification Note' surfaced exactly on v? rows (predicate: verificationMarker === 'v?'); RowAction gained an optional detail field passed through buildTopLevelItems/buildSubmenuItems carrying the marker-clearing consequence copy. package.json +2 command contributions; extension.ts registers setupVerification; watcherInventory allowlist lines bumped 191->192/227->228 for the import shift. Tests: TS unit 835 passing + the 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures (baseline unchanged); tsc --noEmit clean; esbuild compile clean; Python 1185 passed / 1 skipped (no Python touched). Verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major S062-S2-V1-001: gate too narrow vs the locked D3 'any activity-log record' language + failed open on unreadable logs) -> fixed -> R2 narrow re-verify VERIFIED 0 issues. Routed $0.3083.

reason.specifics: Per the routed ai-assignment analysis (gemini-pro), Session 3 is the highest-complexity session of the set - a new blessed Python writer with fail-loud gates plus cross-language extension wiring - warranting a top-tier Claude at high effort, while still cheaper than holding the Fable-5 orchestrator for it.
